title: Decentralized Finance (DeFi)
subtitle: Banking Without Banks
description: Learn the core primitives of DeFi — AMMs, lending markets, yield strategies, and risk management. Practical knowledge for participating in on-chain finance.

lessons.title: AMMs & Liquidity Pools
lessons.description: How automated market makers work and the dynamics of providing liquidity.
lessons.topics: AMM mechanics, Constant product, Impermanent loss, Liquidity depth

lessons.title: Lending & Borrowing
lessons.description: Decentralized lending protocols, collateralization ratios, and liquidation risk.
lessons.topics: Over-collateralization, Variable rates, Liquidation, Compound / Aave

lessons.title: Yield Farming Strategies
lessons.description: How to responsibly farm yields across protocols while managing risk.
lessons.topics: LP fees, Incentive tokens, Auto-compounding, Risk assessment

lessons.title: L2 Bridges & Migration
lessons.description: Moving assets between chains, bridge security, and L2 economics.
lessons.topics: Bridges, Canonical vs third-party, Base migration, Gas optimization

lessons.title: DeFi Risk Management
lessons.description: Identifying and mitigating smart contract risk, oracle risk, and systemic risk.
lessons.topics: Smart contract risk, Oracles, Audit review, Position sizing

lessons.title: DeFi on Base
lessons.description: Overview of the Base DeFi ecosystem: Aerodrome, Uniswap V3, Compound, and more.
lessons.topics: Base protocols, TVL distribution, Yield comparison, Getting started
